review_title: Hassle free Financial Reporting and Microfinance Operations
description: We have benefited exceedingly since we started using this technology. Our productivity has increased as the system is very user-friendly. Our data quality has improved and this has greatly reflected on our reports, guaranteeing transparency to our stakeholders and clients.

pros: Easy to use Accounting is fully detailed Clean Financial reporting
cons: Yet to identify a shortcoming of Co B I S Software, so far so good

description: Like employee of the Bank, we need to give the best experience of attention service to our clients!
author: Selene A.
pros: The easy used of the features and how everything is compiled in one system, no more multitasking searching for clients information!
cons: In this short trial period, I can´t say anything because every time I do my recommendation, the supplier always solving it...It's like magic how easy and complete this program works for our Bank!

review_title: Great User Friendly Core Banking Software
description: We obtained the software for our Microfinance in December 2015, however so far this has been the best experience with a user friendly core banking solution. Our Clients are served faster than before and we have greatly increased our customer base.
author: George A.
pros: User Friendly, Robust Core Banking Features, Intergrated Accounting

description: Affordability Solution and accessibility support team were vital considerations for us, as we look to build our business and grow our client portfolio. Co B I S's easy-to-use, flexible platform was the obvious choice for us. The Co B I S team have provided excellent support in order to get us up and running in a very short time frame.
author: HAGAR M.
pros: Co B I S is easy to use, we just deployed the solution AT Start of August 1 2016 but so far we have managed to serve all our customers faster. Their Mobile Banking Solution / App
cons: Not sure of the clients limit, they however told us that we can have as many clients as we wish, 1,000,000 Clients or so. We are yet to review that as we expand our drive to recruit more clients
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
